next_steps: Image-guided core needle biopsy of the retroperitoneal or periaortic soft tissue
BRAF V600E mutation analysis of biopsy tissue
18F-FDG PET-CT scan to determine extent of involvement and guide biopsy site
Endocrine workup for diabetes insipidus, including serum and urine osmolality and electrolytes
Right-heart catheterization to evaluate for constrictive pericarditis
Skeletal survey or review of long bones for characteristic osteosclerosis
